description: Phase 4.1 lock-status unlocked baseline — all protected files exist but no deny ACLs applied yet
note: No locks have been applied to the Helios runtime. This is the expected pre-lock baseline.

detection_method.description: Test-HeliosLockStatus parses icacls output per-line, matching (S-1-1-0|Everyone) + (DENY) + rights containing W or D
detection_method.false_positive_mitigation: Only matches deny ACEs with W or D rights on the Everyone principal

result: BASELINE_RECORDED — all 8 files exist, no locks applied, ready for lock/unlock verification
